steps.title: Write the total bags equation
steps.content:
The vendor sold 180 total bags of tea and cashews. Since $x$ is tea bags and $y$ is cashew bags:
$$x + y = 180$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation and identify the system
steps.content:
Tea costs \$7 per bag and cashews cost \$12 per bag. Total revenue is \$1,820, so:
$$7x + 12y = 1,820$$
Our system is: $x + y = 180$ and $7x + 12y = 1,820$. Only choice C lists both equations in this form. That matches choice C — C is correct.
